prompt:
Subject: Afternoon Sunshine

Person/Expression:
A 20s woman with a mature, calm face, natural black-brown medium hair, and light, airy bangs. Transparent and elegant Japanese-style photo makeup, keeping the skin's natural texture without excessive smoothing. Looking quietly at the camera with a gentle, slightly relaxed expression at the corners of the mouth.

Clothing/Pose:
Light pink beige ribbed bra top and matching short pants-style loungewear. Fine lace at the edges, non-transparent, elegant and healthy exposure. Reclining diagonally on a low rattan lounge chair, head leaning against a cushion in the back right. The subject's right arm extends naturally toward the front of the screen with fingers relaxed. The left arm is lightly bent above the head, wrist near the cushion. Legs enter prominently in the front left, with one knee slightly bent for perspective. The whole body is relaxed but in a posture that doesn't look sloppy.

Background/Light:
A quiet room in an apartment. Wooden floor, light beige cushions, rattan chair, large window with thin white curtains in the back right. Minimal furniture and decor, low lived-in feel. Low afternoon natural light enters from the window in the back right, softly illuminating the face, shoulders, arms, and upper surfaces of the legs. Shadows fall toward the bottom left, with warm reflected light from the wooden floor returning faintly to the skin. The background is bright, and the subject is enveloped in warm-toned light.

Composition/Camera:
Landscape 4:3. Close-up portrait with a slightly low angle. The subject's legs are prominently placed in the front left, face toward the top right. A diagonal composition where body lines flow from bottom left to top right. Focus on the face and upper body, with the legs in the foreground and the background slightly softly blurred. Natural perspective closer to wide-angle, an intimate distance characteristic of indoor photography. Finished as a Japanese-style photo of relaxing indoors in the afternoon without being overly sexual.

Texture/Style:
High-quality Japanese photography, natural light portrait, soft warm tones, pale beige and pink color scheme. Pores and fine shading are left slightly on the skin, avoiding a plastic look. Careful expression of the rib texture of the fabric, the fineness of the lace, and the material feel of the rattan and cushions. Low contrast, no excessive white blowing, with a soft graininess similar to film photography.

Negative:
Minor, childish face, excessive sexual expression, naked, exposure, see-through clothes, exposure of private parts, excessive emphasis on chest or waist, vulgar poses, brand logos, text, watermarks, same face duplication, unnatural face or gaze, broken fingers, extra fingers, fusion of hands and feet, broken joints, floating feeling, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin correction, plastic skin, excessive HDR, too strong sharpening, obvious AI feel.
